root_cause.interpretation: The dominant defect is low fixture-level draw discrimination/sharpness, not a large aggregate draw-probability deficit.

tested_repair_families.name: conditional_draw_probability_by_total_P_D0_given_T_X
tested_repair_families.note: UEFA Champions League did not have enough strictly-prior eligible conditional-draw training examples under the fixed minimum-100 gate; the threshold was not relaxed.

current_formal_verdict.next_research_requirement: Use richer point-in-time covariates or a materially richer competition-specific conditional D|T model; do not recycle rejected outcome-only residual/calibration variants. Historical PIT lineup/xG/tactical or synchronized market evidence must be obtained and validated before those features can receive non-zero formal influence.

governance_note: This is a research/governance receipt only. It does not modify CURRENT V4.7.0, create a promotion receipt, change formal runtime weights, or alter any production probability.
